ideas.title: Diagnose & repair the stale content feed (newest item 4d old)
ideas.why: The live watchdog signal reports health=DEGRADED with the `feed` check failing (newest item 4 days old), directly threatening the Error-budget/CI-as-Oracle observability the loop depends on.

ideas.title: Provenance / audit-trail overlay stamping each AI change with review status
ideas.why: Grounded in the 'AI-written, human-reviewed code provenance' HN signal (Jacquard) and the data-transparency backlash — an Agent-execution-tracing + Build-in-public panel over the ~factory tab that shows, per commit, whether it was gate-only or human-reviewed makes the pipeline honestly transparent.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for instant post search & navigation
ideas.why: Borrowing the discovery pattern that makes Linear and the Vercel docs a destination, a fuzzy ⌘K palette (NOT a shell) turns the growing post archive into something effortless to navigate — an Agent-native-application affordance the site currently lacks.

ideas.title: Route agent inference to the idle Spark GB10 GPUs instead of cloud
ideas.why: Router telemetry shows spark_today=0 and cloud_hard=3268 while both GB10 nodes sit at util=0/temp<50 — a Platform-native-inference / Second-Life-Hardware / Coherent-interconnect win that cuts token cost by using hardware already paid for.

ideas.title: Interactive 3D WebGL knowledge graph of the 523-concept ontology
ideas.why: The HN world-signal names 'interactive personal-data globes/maps' as the top-voted showcase format; rendering brain/ontology.json as an explorable graph makes Software-cartography, Bidirectional-linking, Infinite-canvas and Level-of-detail-rendering into the site's one memorable, shareable interaction.

ideas.title: Per-post Open Graph + canonical <link> meta tags
ideas.why: The destination lens: every serious engineering blog (e.g. Stripe) ships per-post OG/Twitter cards and canonical URLs so shares render richly and SEO isn't diluted — this is a concrete, missing Audience-growth/Algorithm-aware-content-formatting gap, not decoration.
